# lib/xp

XP calculation and level progression formulas.

## Testing

Tests: `__tests__/lib/xp/calculator.test.ts` (Vitest)

Uses data-driven `it.each()` tables covering XP-to-level mapping, level thresholds, and edge cases. Run with `npm run test:convex`.
